items.title: What Might Make The August CPI Report Come In Very Hot
items.description: A hot CPI may not derail the imminent rate cut, but could limit further cuts in 2025, keeping investors cautious on future Fed policy. Read the latest analysis ahead of the report here.

items.title: Is Elevance Health Stock Underperforming the S&P 500?
items.description: Elevance Health has considerably underperformed the S&P 500 over the past year, but analysts are moderately optimistic about the stock’s prospects.

items.title: Warren Buffett’s New Stock Bets Revealed — Should You Buy In, Too?
items.description: Recently, Warren Buffett’s holding company, Berkshire Hathaway, filed its quarterly Form 13F equity investment portfolio, providing investors with an update regarding the company’s holdings. The filing indicated, among other things, five newer holdings that Buffett and Berkshire have acquired, including one rather surprising investment in a very controversial and embattled company.

items.title: 5 Best-Performing Sector ETFs of August
items.description: Marijuana, crypto, materials, healthcare and space ETFs led August gains despite tech volatility. These ETFs are MSOS, REMX, IHF, UFO, and ETHW.
